individual.title.title.segment: PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF MICHIGAN, Plaintiff-Appellee,

content.judge.judge.line: Brian K. Zahra Richard H. Bernstein Elizabeth M. Welch Kyra H. Bolden Kimberly A. Thomas Noah P. Hood, Justices

para.paratext: On order of the Chief Justice, the motion of the American Civil Liberties Union to extend the time for filing its brief amicus curiae and to participate in oral argument is GRANTED. The amicus brief submitted on February 13, 2026, is accepted as timely filed.

The total time allowed for oral argument is increased to 40 minutes: 20 minutes for the defendant-appellant, who will share 5 minutes of time with the American Civil Liberties Union, and 20 minutes for the plaintiff-appellee, who will share 5 minutes of time with the Prosecuting Attorneys Association of Michigan.
